guideline_references: Therapeutic Guidelines: sore throat / peritonsillar abscess
intentional_test_features: Red herrings: severe sore throat, tender lymphadenopathy and inability to swallow mimic quinsy/airway compromise and bacterial pharyngitis.
Important-not-to-miss: peritonsillar abscess and airway compromise cannot be excluded remotely; painful swallowing risks dehydration.
Anchoring: 'post-EBV ME/CFS flare' should not close off quinsy/strep/acute HIV.
Commission trap: home NSAID + numbing spray given in person; the safe remote step is airway screening and urgent in-person throat assessment.
Telehealth limits: oropharyngeal examination and node palpation cannot be done over chat.

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date)
